description_long: This is a whimsical, two-tiered cake designed to resemble a unicorn, featuring pastel colors and playful decorations. The lower tier is encircled with a thick band of light pink icing, while the upper tier is adorned with a mint green band and topped with a golden spiral horn. Two white ears with pink centers and closed eyes with long lashes are positioned on the front, along with pastel-colored floral decorations between the ears. The cake sits on a round, black cake board that provides a stable base. The overall appearance is festive and suitable for celebrations, especially for children or themed parties.
description: A two-tiered unicorn-themed cake with pastel icing, a golden horn, and floral decorations, displayed on a black cake board.
description_view_0: Front view showing the unicorn face, golden horn, ears, floral decorations, and pastel icing bands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the horn, ears, and the layered icing bands, with the unicorn face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cake, with the horn and ears visible but no facial features or floral decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the horn, ears, and icing bands, with the unicorn face partially visible from the side.
